allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./tools/desk/editor.js'\).then\(async m => { const data = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); const plan = await m.runEditor\(data, { news:{themes:['금리','반도체']}, analyst:{findings:[]}, crypto:{findings:[]} }\); console.log\('헤드라인:', plan.headline\); console.log\('include_crypto:', plan.include_crypto\); console.log\('include_analyst:', plan.include_analyst\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.marketCap, '조'\); console.log\('VKOSPI today:', d.domestic.vkospi?.today\); console.log\('supply foreign:', d.domestic.supply?.foreign\); console.log\('supplyHistory len:', d.domestic.supplyHistory?.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('KOSPI today:', d.domestic.kospi?.today, '\(source:', d.domestic.kospi?.source, '\)'\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.marketCap, '/ prev:', d.domestic.prevMarketCap, '/ pct:', d.domestic.marketCapPct\); console.log\('volumeBn:', d.domestic.volumeBn, '/ prevVolumeBn:', d.domestic.prevVolumeBn\); console.log\('kospiHistory last 2:', JSON.stringify\(d.domestic.kospiHistory.slice\(-2\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('KOSPI:', d.domestic.kospi?.today, '/ source:', d.domestic.kospi?.source\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.marketCap, '/ prev:', d.domestic.prevMarketCap, '/ pct:', d.domestic.marketCapPct\); console.log\('volumeBn:', d.domestic.volumeBn, '/ prevVolumeBn:', d.domestic.prevVolumeBn\); console.log\('VKOSPI:', d.domestic.vkospi?.today\); console.log\('kospiHistory tradingValueBn[]:', d.domestic.kospiHistory.map\(h=>h.tradingValueBn\)\);")
